steps.speaker: Phoenix
steps.text: We need a drummer. I could put a flyer up at the coffee shop...

steps.speaker: Lucky
steps.text: Too slow. I'm going to ask the universe.

steps.speaker: Phoenix
steps.text: My brain thinks that is not how things work.

Lucky channels pure raw slime energy
directly into the amp's input jack.
Their arm glows violently.

A neon soundwave erupts from the speaker cone.
So powerful it physically bends
the walls of the apartment outward.

The wave rolls over the rooftops of Minneapolis,
causing a PRODUCTIVITY IS FREEDOM billboard
to briefly glitch.

The wave travels north.
Over highways and frozen suburbs.
Deep into the pine forests of Northern Minnesota.

A detached garage in the dark.
Ryan sits behind a massive drum kit.

The glowing cosmic wave washes completely over him.
He freezes.
His drumsticks hover in mid-air.
His eyes go wide.
[He feels the rhythm of the cosmos.]

steps.speaker: Phoenix
steps.text: ...My brain thinks that actually worked. City Sound Rehearsal is on the other side of town. The door's downstairs.
